title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: virtio-win bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for virtio-win is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Kernel-based Virtual Machine (KVM) offers a full virtualization solution forLinux on numerous hardware platforms. The virt:rhel module contains packageswhich provide user-space components used to run virtual machines using KVM.The packages also provide APIs for managing and interacting with the virtualized systems.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): "MEMORY MANAGEMENT" BSOD with no storage delay and only on virtio-blk [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-145871)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64

fixes.description: "MEMORY MANAGEMENT" BSOD with no storage delay and only on virtio-blk [rhel-10.1.z]

full_text:
An update for virtio-win is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Kernel-based Virtual Machine (KVM) offers a full virtualization solution forLinux on numerous hardware platforms. The virt:rhel module contains packageswhich provide user-space components used to run virtual machines using KVM.The packages also provide APIs for managing and interacting with the virtualized systems.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): "MEMORY MANAGEMENT" BSOD with no storage delay and only on virtio-blk [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-145871)
